metadata.description: Hear Claude Code respond — text-to-speech via macOS `say`.

plugins.name: claude-code-tts
plugins.description: Speak each Claude Code assistant turn aloud through macOS's `say` command. Toggle on/off and switch between brief (last sentence) and full (whole message) modes via slash commands. Pairs naturally with Claude Code's built-in voice input for a hands-free coding loop.
